violations.text: (Alfredo and Buffalo Cheese sauce) was observed held at (88-89) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC reheated to 165 above. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

The (ceiling ) in the (kitchen ) area has an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC took out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023

Various foods were observed held at 44-49 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Disposal. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/14/2023
Rodent sighting observed during inspection. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/28/2023
